ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was billed */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the customer */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "aisle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aisle where the product is located */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_aisle_id FOREIGN KEY ("aisle_id") REFERENCES aisles ("aisle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "preferred_shipping_method" TEXT /* Preferred shipping method of the customer */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aisles" (
  "aisle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aisle */,
  "aisle_name" TEXT /* Name of the aisle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the aisle in the store */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the aisle belongs to */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the aisle */,
  "temperature_control" TEXT /* Whether the aisle has temperature control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aisle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aisles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point to trigger restocking */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking */,
  "safety_stock" INTEGER /* Safety stock level */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected next restock date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reorder_history" (
  "reorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product reordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who reordered the product */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the product was reordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product reordered */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the reorder */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the reorder */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the reorder */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the reorder */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the reorder */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the reorder */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the customer for the reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for login */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID */,
  "session_expiry" TEXT /* Session expiry time */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Whether the account is locked (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
